message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "UI" as UI
rectangle "Main_Thread" as MainThread
rectangle "Worker_Thread" as WorkerThread

User -> UI : Push the button
activate UI
UI -> MainThread : Trigger 'postToWorkerThread'
activate MainThread
MainThread --> UI : Get textarea value
deactivate MainThread
UI -> WorkerThread : postMessage
activate WorkerThread
WorkerThread --> MainThread : postMessage with ACK (*1)
deactivate WorkerThread
MainThread --> UI : Set textarea value with ACK message
deactivate UI

@enduml
```
